programme.title: Mumbai Metro

programme.title: Vadena
programme.desc: Vadena

programme.title: Meri Taqat Meri Himmat
programme.desc: A kickboxer falls in love with a social activist. She embarks on a quest to disclose the malpractices of a violent mafia who carries out operations to produce genetically modified crops.

programme.title: Pandigai
programme.desc: Velu, a fearless yet impoverished fighter, rises to fame in an underground fight club. However, he seeks an escape from the violent life he's entangled in when he falls in love with a woman.

programme.title: Khuda Haafiz
programme.desc: When a financial crisis leaves Sameer and Nargis jobless, they resort to taking up a job in the Middle East. But when Nargis goes missing on arrival, Sameer sets out on a bloody quest to find her.

programme.title: Selfie
programme.desc: An ill-tempered engineering student becomes embroiled in an underground college admissions racket. Soon, he and his friends become the targets of gangsters and loan sharks.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: A meek man, Devdhar, gets infuriated after a politician's son throws acid on his sister. However, his life changes when he kills the culprit, whose family later seeks revenge from Devdhar.

programme.title: Mujhse Dosti Karoge!
programme.desc: Raj falls in love with Tina after their friendship blossoms via emails. However, he is unaware that Tina's best friend, Pooja, is the one writing these mails.

programme.title: Singham Returns
programme.desc: Bajirao Singham, an honest police officer, encounters Babaji, a god-man with connections to high profile politicians, when he investigates the death of an officer from his team.

programme.title: Dilwale
programme.desc: Despite the family rivalry, Raj and Meera fall in love other but a misunderstanding causes them to part ways. Years later, fate brings them together when their siblings fall for each other.

programme.title: Ragada
programme.desc: Satya, a money-minded man, arrives in Hyderabad and starts working for a gangster, GK. However, he soon becomes the target of another gangster, Peddanna.

programme.title: De De Pyaar De
programme.desc: When Ashish falls in love with Ayesha, a woman almost half his age, he introduces her to his ex-wife and children. However, their unacceptance threatens to ruin their relationship.

programme.desc: Movie
